## SemVer impact

<!-- Choose one. -->

- [ ] **Patch** — bug fix, no API change (`fix:`)
- [ ] **Minor** — additive, backward-compatible (`feat:`)
- [ ] **Major** — breaking change (`feat!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` in commit footer)
- [ ] **None** — docs / chore / refactor / test
